title: OBJECT-LEVEL decision from a watched session — MUST be rejected by the meta-scope gate
gap: fixture only — simulates a decision made about the app Trident is watching, not about Trident
pattern: A session invokes Trident to watch a product build; a design decision about THAT product is mistakenly written to the decisions ledger.
origin: FIXTURE — known-bad control. applied_in points outside Trident's design tree; the gate must flag it.
